prompt: Topcoder Arena 3.0 SRM API backlog: implement the GET /api/v1/problems listing contract so the arena UI can filter SRM problems by difficulty, respect the 50-result paging limit, emit deterministic ordering by roundId, and provide metadata (totalProblems, filteredCount, appliedLimit, difficultyBreakdown). Include sorted componentLanguages when includeComponents=true so the UI can surface language hints.

schema_hints: Listing payload must include metadata with totalProblems, filteredCount, appliedLimit, and optionally componentLanguageTotals/componentStatusTotals.
Problems are sourced from data/problems.json and must be sorted by roundId ascending when returned.

contract.description: GET /api/v1/problems must filter difficulty case-insensitively, enforce the 50-result limit, and report metadata fields totalProblems/filteredCount/appliedLimit/difficultyBreakdown.
tests: SRM problem listing contract::filters by difficulty, enforces limit, and emits metadata

contract.description: Returned problems must be sorted deterministically by roundId ascending within the filtered set.
tests: SRM problem listing contract::filters by difficulty, enforces limit, and emits metadata

contract.description: When includeComponents=true, both metadata.componentLanguageTotals/componentStatusTotals and per-problem componentLanguages must reflect the filtered+limited set.
tests: SRM problem listing contract::filters by difficulty, enforces limit, and emits metadata

contract.description: Per-problem componentLanguages arrays must be deduplicated and sorted case-insensitively to aid the UI.
tests: SRM problem listing contract::filters by difficulty, enforces limit, and emits metadata

metadata.notes: Exercise controller-service collaboration and metadata aggregation. Tests cover filtering, limit enforcement, sorting, and component language emission.
